stages.concept:
# Unit 113: 비교급 + and + 비교급 / the + 비교급, the + 비교급 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **비교급 반복 표현**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **비교급 + and + 비교급** — 점점 더 ~한

> It's getting **colder and colder**.
> 점점 더 추워지고 있다.

> She became **more and more beautiful**.
> 그녀는 점점 더 아름다워졌다.

> The days are getting **longer and longer**.
> 낮이 점점 더 길어지고 있다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **the + 비교급 ~, the + 비교급 ~** — ~할수록 더 …한

> **The more** you study, **the smarter** you become.
> 공부를 많이 할수록, 더 똑똑해진다.

> **The harder** you work, **the more** money you earn.
> 열심히 일할수록, 더 많은 돈을 번다.

> **The sooner**, **the better**.
> 빠르면 빠를수록 좋다.

> **The more** I know him, **the more** I like him.
> 그를 알면 알수록, 그를 더 좋아하게 된다.

**Q. 다음 문장의 괄호 안에 알맞은 형태를 고르세요.**
"The (       ) you run, the earlier you will arrive." (네가 더 빨리 달릴수록, 너는 더 일찍 도착할 것이다.)
1. fast
2. faster ✅
3. fastest

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요. '~하면 할수록 더 ...하다'는 뜻을 나타낼 때는 앞과 뒤의 절에 모두 'the + 비교급' 형태를 써주어야 해요.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 비교급 and 비교급(점점 더), the 비교급 the 비교급(~할수록 더)! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 113: 비교급+and+비교급, the+비교급, the+비교급 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
The singer is getting (     ) famous.
> **정답** more and more

---

**02.** The weather is getting ? .
> **정답** colder and colder

---

**03.** ? you practice, ? you get.
> **정답** The more, the better

---

**04.** The days are getting ? .
> **정답** longer and longer

---

**05.** ? you eat, ? you become.
> **정답** The more, the fatter

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
It is getting cold and cold.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** cold and cold → colder and colder

---

**07.** More you study, better you become.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** More → The more, better → the better

---

**08.** She is becoming beautiful and beautiful.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** beautiful and beautiful → more and more beautiful

---

**09.** The high you go, the cold it gets.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** high → higher, cold → colder

---

**10.** The traffic is getting bad and bad.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** bad and bad → worse and worse

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
날씨가 점점 더 추워지고 있다.
The weather is getting .
> **정답** colder and colder

---

**12.** 많이 연습할수록 더 잘하게 된다.
you practice, you get.
> **정답** The more, the better

---

**13.** 그녀는 점점 더 예뻐지고 있다.
She is getting .
> **정답** more and more beautiful

---

**14.** 높이 올라갈수록 더 추워진다.
you go, it gets.
> **정답** The higher, the colder

---

**15.** 영어가 점점 더 쉬워지고 있다.
English is getting .
> **정답** easier and easier

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
날이 점점 더 길어지고 있다.
The days getting are longer and longer
> **정답** The / days / are / getting / longer / and / longer

---

**17.** 일찍 일어날수록 더 건강해진다.
The you earlier get up the you healthier become
> **정답** The / earlier / you / get / up / the / healthier / you / become

---

**18.** 그는 점점 더 유명해지고 있다.
He becoming is more and more famous
> **정답** He / is / becoming / more / and / more / famous

---

**19.** 많이 읽을수록 더 많이 안다.
The you more read the more you know
> **정답** The / more / you / read / the / more / you / know

---

**20.** 시험이 점점 더 어려워지고 있다.
The test getting is harder and harder
> **정답** The / test / is / getting / harder / and / harder
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 113: 비교급+and+비교급  the+비교급, the+비교급 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
______________ you walk, _____________ you can
get there.
The fastly - the early
The faster - earlier
The fastest - the earliest
The faster - the earlier
> **정답** The faster - the earlier

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
__________________ you smile,
___________________ you look.
The more - the beautifuler
The much - the most beautiful
The more - the more beautiful
More - more beautiful
> **정답** The more - the more beautiful

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
After it rained, it became ______________ and
________________.
the coldest - the coldest
cold - cold
colder - colder
the colder - the colder
> **정답** colder - colder

---

**04.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The nearer you live, the faster you can come.
The older you get, the more slowly you heal.
The sooner you arrive, the better it will be.
The colder it becomes, the thick clothes you
will wear.
> **정답** The colder it becomes, the thick clothes you will
wear.

---

**05.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
More and more people choose to quit the job.
Tom's son gets taller and taller every
year.
The man earns lesser and lesser money.
The weather becomes warmer and warmer
each year.
> **정답** The man earns lesser and lesser money.

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
내가 말을 더 많이 할수록, 더 많은 실수를 할 것이다.
I talk more, I will make mistakes more.
The more I talk, the more mistakes I will
make.
I talk the more, I will make mistakes the more.
The much I talk, the much mistakes I will
make.
> **정답** The more I talk, the more mistakes I will make.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
물건이 비쌀수록, 사람들은 그것을 더 사고 싶어 한다.
A product is more expensive, more people
want to buy it.
The more expensive a product is, people want
to buy it more.
The more expensive a product is, the more
people want to buy it.
The more expensive a product is, many people
want to buy it more.
> **정답** The more expensive a product is, the more people
want to buy it.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
영어 공부를 열심히 하면, 너의 영어는 점점 더 좋아질 것이다.
If you study English hard, your English will
become the better and the better.
If you study English hard, your English will
become the better and the best.
If you study English hard, your English will
become gooder and gooder.
If you study English hard, your English will
become better and better.
> **정답** If you study English hard, your English will become
better and better.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The little sugar he puts into his coffee, the
better it will taste.
The more I eat, the more I want to eat.
With a lot of practice, the runner could run
faster and faster.
After the accident, he got sicker and sicker.
> **정답** The little sugar he puts into his coffee, the better it
will taste.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The harder you study, the better your grade
will be.
In Korea, we have less and less snow each
year.
The story gets more interesting and more
interesting.
The higher you climb, the more dangerous
you will feel.
> **정답** The story gets more interesting and more
interesting.

---

**11.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The weather gets more and
more hot.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** more and more hot. → hotter and hotter

---

**12.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The older you get, more wise
you can be.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** more wise → the wiser

---

**13.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The more you eat junk food,
the badder the damage will be
to your body.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** badder → worse

---

**14.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Her English is getting good
and better.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** good → better

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
The baby cried more louder and louder.
The more you study, the more you will learn.
The high they went up, the cold it became.
Older he grew, taller he is.
> **정답** The more you study, the more you will learn.

---

**16.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
The more you drink, the often you need to go
to the bathroom.
The older people grow, the worse their eye
sights will be.
The stronger coffee is, more my dad likes it.
The more you practice it, the easy it will be for
you.
> **정답** The older people grow, the worse their eye sights
will be.

---

**17.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 만드시오.
The party got noisy next door. I became angry.
the party got, the angrier I became.
> **정답** The, noisier

---

**18.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 만드시오.
The singer sang loud. The crowd got excited.
The louder the singer sang,
the crowd got.
> **정답** the, more, excited

---

**19.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
These days, it is getting
hot and hot each day. It
makes me turn on the air conditioner all day long.
The longer I stay in front of the air
conditioner, the worst my headache gets.
> **정답** hotter and hotter, The longer, the worse

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
More and more people work
from home. The longer we stay home,
the less we will spend our energy. We
are getting fat and fat . As
a result, we all need to exercise. The more we
exercise, the healthy we will be.
• As a result 그 결과로
> **정답** More and more, The longer, the less, fatter and
fatter, the healthier
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 113 비교급+and+비교급  the+비교급, the+비교급중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
너가 운전을 더 빨리할 수록, 그것은 더 위험할 수 있다.
[fast, dangerous]
 you drive,  (     )  it can
be.
정답 The faster, the more dangerous

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
두 시간의 쇼핑 후에, 그녀의 쇼핑백은 점점 더 무거워졌다.
힌트 (     ) heavy
After two hours of shopping, her shopping bag
became  (     ) .
정답 heavier and heavier

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
사람들이 나이들수록 그들은 덜 용감해 진다.
힌트 (     ) old, brave
 people grow, 
they become.
정답 The older, the less brave

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 바르게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
바이올린 연습을 많이 할 수록, 너는 더 잘 연주할 수 있게
된다.
힌트 (     ) the, can, you, play, better
The more you practice the violin,  (     )  
  (     )   (     ) .
정답 the, better, you, can, play

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 바르게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
Andy의 강아지는 점점 더 커졌다.
힌트 (     ) bigger, grew, and, bigger
Andy's dog  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 grew, bigger, and, bigger

---

**06.** 틀린 부분을 고쳐 문장을 완성하시오.
The much you read, the smart you become.
 you read,  (     )  you
become.
정답 The more, the smarter

---

**07.** 틀린 부분을 고쳐 문장을 완성하시오.
The world has gotten more hot and hot every year.
The world  (     )  every
year.
정답 has gotten hotter and hotter

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 대화를 완성하시오. (the+비교급,
the+비교급 사용할 것)
much, thin
A: Do you know how to lose some weight? I am
getting fat.
B: You should exercise.  (     )  you
exercise,  (     )  you will be.
정답 The more, the thinner

---

**09.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 대화를 완성하시오. (비교급 and
비교급 사용할 것)
dark
A: Do you want me to turn on the light?
B: Yes, please. It is 7 o'clock. It is getting
.
정답 darker and darker

---

**10.** 주어진 형용사를 알맞은 형태로 고쳐 다음 글을
완성하시오.
easy, clearly, good
When you give a speech in front of people, you should
speak clearly.  (     )  you speak,
 they will understand. Practice your
speech a lot and your speech will get
 and  (     ) .
정답 The more clearly, the more easily, better, better

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 113: 비교급+and+비교급 / the+비교급, the+비교급 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
______________ you walk, _____________ you can arrive.
The fastly - the early The faster - earlier The fastest - the earliest The faster - the earlier
> 정답: The faster - the earlier

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
__________________ you practice, ___________________ you play.
The more - the beautifuler The much - the most beautiful The more - the more beautiful More - more beautiful
> 정답: The more - the more beautiful

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
After the storm, it became ______________ and ________________. the coldest - the coldest cold - cold colder - colder the colder - the colder
> 정답: colder - colder

---

**04.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The nearer you sit, the better you can hear.
The older you get, the more slowly you recover.
The sooner you finish, the better it will be.
The colder it becomes, the thick jackets you will wear.
> 정답: The colder it becomes, the thick jackets you will

---

**05.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
More and more students choose to study abroad.
Tom's daughter gets taller and taller every year.
The store earns lesser and lesser profit.
The city becomes busier and busier each year.
> 정답: The store earns lesser and lesser profit.

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
내가 연습을 더 많이 할수록, 더 많은 실수를 할 것이다.
I practice more, I will make mistakes more.
The more I practice, the more mistakes I will make.
I practice the more, I will make mistakes the more.
The much I practice, the much mistakes I will make.
> 정답: The more I practice, the more mistakes I will make.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
음식이 비쌀수록, 사람들은 그것을 더 사고 싶어 한다.
Food is more expensive, more people want to buy it.
The more expensive food is, people want to buy it more.
The more expensive food is, the more people want to buy it.
The more expensive food is, many people want to buy it more.
> 정답: The more expensive food is, the more people

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
수학 공부를 열심히 하면, 너의 수학은 점점 더 좋아질 것이다.
If you study math hard, your math will become the better and the better.
If you study math hard, your math will become the better and the best.
If you study math hard, your math will become gooder and gooder.
If you study math hard, your math will become better and better.
> 정답: If you study math hard, your math will become

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The little water she drinks, the better she will feel.
The more I read, the more I want to learn.
With a lot of practice, the swimmer could swim faster and faster.
After the injury, he got weaker and weaker.
> 정답: The little water she drinks, the better she will

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The harder you train, the stronger you will become.
In this area, we have less and less rain each year.
The story gets more exciting and more exciting.
The higher you climb, the more tired you will feel.
> 정답: The story gets more exciting and more

---

**11.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. The  weather  gets  more  and more  cold. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: more and more cold. → colder and colder

---

**12.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. The  older  you  get,  more  wise you  can  be. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: more wise → the wiser

---

**13.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. The  more  you  eat  fast  food, the  badder  the  effect  will  be on  your  health. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: badder → worse

---

**14.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Her  Korean  is  getting  good and  better. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: good → better

---
